title: Use a high-entropy pool-view PIN fixture
tierReasoning: Test-only fixture hardening with no runtime behavior change.
decision: Replace the common literal 1234 with one deterministic high-entropy constant used by both setup and the no-leak assertion.

causalAutopsy.trigger: The negative substring assertion used a common four-character value.
causalAutopsy.rootCause: The fixture optimized for readability rather than collision resistance in a serialized envelope.
causalAutopsy.failureMode: Unrelated serialized values containing 1234 could cause a false failure, while the assertion did not uniquely identify the test credential.
causalAutopsy.repair: Use a distinctive deterministic PIN fixture and assert against that exact value.

alternatives: Generate a random PIN per run, reducing failure reproducibility
